system_name: Cross-Border Payments Platform - Tier 1 Retail Bank

assets.name: ECDH-P384
assets.location: SWIFT messaging gateway, ephemeral session key exchange
assets.notes: Forward secrecy is a hard requirement for SWIFT traffic per the customer security programme.

assets.name: ECDSA-P256
assets.location: SWIFT messaging gateway, message integrity signature
assets.notes: Signs outgoing SWIFT MT/MX messages for integrity and non-repudiation.

assets.name: RSA-2048
assets.location: Cardholder data environment, payment gateway TLS certificate
assets.notes: In scope for PCI DSS 4.0. Standard server certificate, straightforward rotation path.

assets.name: AES-256-GCM
assets.location: Cardholder data environment, PAN encryption at rest
assets.notes: Already at a 256-bit key size; included to demonstrate the framework correctly identifies assets that need no further change.
